assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has access to the Braze dashboard and API key
Developer has an existing app or website codebase

developer_goal: Integrate Braze SDK into an application to enable user data collection and messaging capabilities.

first_success.outcome: SDK integration completed and data flow established
first_success.observable_signal: Braze SDK instance created with configuration and user identification, and data flush occurs to Braze servers

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: REST API
candidates.reason: The API is documented but the first-mile onboarding focuses on SDK integration for app or site data ingestion and messaging.

candidates.name: Dashboard UI
candidates.reason: The dashboard is used for configuration and campaign management but initial developer onboarding centers on SDK integration.

required_fields.label: User identifier string

required_path.action: Trigger data flush to send cached data to Braze servers

prerequisites.description: Have a Braze account with access to the dashboard and API key.
Have an existing app or website codebase where the Braze SDK can be integrated.
Developer must have programming knowledge for the target platform (e.g., iOS, Android, Web).

external_gates.description: Must have a Braze account with API key to proceed with SDK integration.
Correct API key and endpoint must be configured in SDK initialization.
Valid user identifier must be provided to identify the user in Braze.
Network connection required to flush data to Braze servers.

platform_outcomes.description: Braze SDK integrated and initialized in the app, successfully sending user data to Braze servers.

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted Braze route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
